evals.name: schema-relations
evals.prompt: Design Drizzle schema and relations for users, posts, and comments, including database foreign keys where appropriate.

evals.name: query-builder-rqb
evals.prompt: Write a Drizzle relational query with nested posts and comments, filters, and a transaction for a follow-up update.
evals.expected_output: mentions relational queries plus transaction boundaries.

evals.name: migration-flow
evals.prompt: A team changed Drizzle schema in TypeScript and needs a safe production migration flow with Drizzle Kit.

evals.name: elysia-typebox-bridge
evals.prompt: Convert a Drizzle user table into Elysia request and response schemas with drizzle-typebox and avoid TypeBox symbol conflicts.
evals.expected_output: handles generated schema variables and TypeBox pinning.

evals.name: migration-strategy
evals.prompt: Choose between database-first pull, drizzle-kit push, generated SQL migrations, and external migration tools.

evals.name: connection-serverless
evals.prompt: Choose between pooled connections, serverless connection (HTTP/Data API), and read-replica topology for a Bun + Elysia backend using Drizzle.

evals.name: dialect-driver
evals.prompt: Choose between PostgreSQL, MySQL, and SQLite dialects and their drivers for a Bun + Elysia backend using Drizzle.
